name: codex-project-memory
description: Local project memory with structured review, source citations, and a guide-first offline knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Durable local memory for each Codex project.
interface.longDescription: Keep private project memories separate, trace claims to validated source files, review durable updates, and understand them through a guided offline knowledge workspace with optional graph exploration.
defaultPrompt: Load this project's saved context before we continue.
Propose durable memories from the work we just finished.
Guide me through this project's saved knowledge and current gaps.
Show the offline knowledge graph and suggested exploration questions.
Link another project for read-only reference.
